examples: The couple already had a son, Shay, in 2007.

Goalkeeper Shay Given returns along with Steven Taylor, Matthew Pattison, Peter Ramage and Shola Ameobi.
Other fiction nominees include Argentine Sergio Chejfec's (SHAY'-fekz) "The Planets, " translated from Spanish by Heather Cleary.
